en: Oh, my God. Oh, God, I knew something had to be wrong because my fingernails did not grow at all yesterday.
ko: 오 마이 갓, 뭔가 잘못됐다는 걸 알았어. 내 손톱이 어제 전혀 자라지 않았거든.
ja: 何か変だと思ったのよ。昨日爪が全然伸びなかったの。
zhTW: 天啊。我就知道有什麼不對，因為我昨天指甲完全沒長。
vi: Troi oi. Toi biet co gi do khong on vi mong tay toi hom qua khong moc chut nao.

en: Yeah, well, I guess they had a fight and he got drunk.
ko: 응, 그들이 싸웠고 그는 술에 취했나 봐.
ja: 多分、喧嘩して酔っぱらったんだろう。
zhTW: 嗯，我猜他們吵架了然後他喝醉了。
vi: Uh, co le ho da cai nhau roi anh ta say.

en: You guys knew about this and you didn't tell us?
ko: 너희는 그걸 알고 있었고, 우리에게 말하지 않았잖아.
ja: それ知ってて言わなかったの？
zhTW: 你們知道這件事卻不告訴我們？
vi: May biet chuyen do ma khong noi cho tui?

en: He had sex and we get hit in our heads.
ko: 그는 섹스를 하고 우리는 머리를 맞는 거야?
ja: あいつがセックスして僕たちが頭を殴られるのか？
vi: Han lam chuyen do con chung toi bi danh vao dau?

en: You know what? I want you to leave. Get out of here. Just get out now. No, no, I know. I want to stay.
I want to talk about this. Okay. All right.
vi: Toi muon noi ve chuyen nay.

en: What? Was she good? Don't answer that.
vi: Gi co? Co ta gioi khong?

en: Come on, Ross. You said you wanted to talk about it. Let's talk about it. How was she?
ko: 이봐, 로스, 너 얘기하고 싶다고 했잖아.
ja: 話したいって言ったでしょ。
vi: Anh noi anh muon noi chuyen.

en: She was awful. Horrible. She was not good. Not good.
ja: 最悪だった。良くなかった。
vi: Co ta te lam. Khong tot. Khong tot.

ja: 大事なのは彼女は僕にとって何でもなかったってことだ。
zhTW: 重要的是她對我來說什麼都不是。
vi: Dieu quan trong la co ta khong co y nghia gi voi toi.

ja: 変化を好む人はいない。

en: Just stop! Okay, okay, okay, okay.
ja: 全部大丈夫だと思ってたんでしょ。
vi: Anh cu nghi moi thu deu on.
